name: Rawlinsons Australian Construction Handbook 2024 — Cost Benchmarks
description: Enables OCERP built-in validation rules that compare project cost-per-m² and elemental cost ratios against current Rawlinsons Australian Construction Handbook 2024 averages, apply state/city location factors, and flag outliers for review.
elemental_breakdown: AIQS Australian Cost Management Manual / NATSPEC elemental codes
